description: Join us for eChai's Startup Open House in Hyderabad. An easy, informal evening with founders and startup folks from across the city. Walk in, meet people building interesting things, and join the conversations. Whether you are starting up, scaling, or simply curious about the ecosystem, you will fit right in. Come say hello and share what you are working on.
search_query: where to meet investors in Hyderabad startup ecosystem
title: eChai's Startup Open House in Hyderabad
